parsed.production_notes: The video is a screencast of a mobile application. The illustrations displayed within the app appear to be AI-generated, particularly the second image which exhibits a typical AI-painted aesthetic with slightly unnatural lighting and blending of animal features.

panels.panel_visual_description: A stylized, flat, geometric illustration of farm animals gathered in front of a dark barn. The style resembles paper cutouts with textured surfaces. The animals include white horses, sheep, pigs, chickens, and a black dog. The barn has a windmill-like structure on top and a figure resembling a nutcracker or guard. The color palette consists of muted browns, blacks, whites, and dark reds.

scenes.visual_description: A mobile phone screen recording. The top half displays a stylized illustration of farm animals. The bottom half contains a paragraph of English text. A hand cursor appears and taps the word 'equal', bringing up a small popup with the word's pronunciation and Vietnamese translation. A banner at the top reads 'ĐỌC SÁCH TIẾNG ANH 10 PHÚT MỖI NGÀY'.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Male narrator says: All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others,
Female app voice says: equal
scenes.on_screen_text:
ĐỌC SÁCH TIẾNG ANH 10 PHÚT MỖI NGÀY (Read English books 10 minutes a day)
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
equal / ˈiːkwəl / bình đẳng (equal) / Đã biết (Already know) / Học (Learn)

panels.panel_visual_description: A painted-style illustration of farm animals in a pastoral setting during golden hour. On the left, a brown cow looks towards the viewer. In the center background, two sheep stand in a grassy field. On the right, the head and neck of a white horse are visible. Behind the sheep, there is a red wooden barn. The lighting is warm and soft, typical of late afternoon sun.

scenes.visual_description: The top illustration changes to a more realistic, painted scene of a cow, sheep, and horse. The English text in the bottom half remains the same. The hand cursor continues to tap various words in the text ('slowly', 'cold', 'tried', 'words', 'something', 'farm', 'always'), each time triggering a popup with the word's phonetic spelling and Vietnamese translation. The top banner remains visible.

scenes.on_screen_text:
ĐỌC SÁCH TIẾNG ANH 10 PHÚT MỖI NGÀY (Read English books 10 minutes a day)
TRẠI SÚC VẬT GEORGE ORWELL (Animal Farm George Orwell)
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
slowly / ˈsloʊli / chậm rãi (slowly)
cold / koʊld / lạnh (cold)
to try / tu traɪ / để thử (to try)
word / wɜːrd / từ (word)
something / ˈsʌmθɪŋ / thứ gì đó (something)
farm / fɑːrm / trang trại (farm)
always / ˈɔːlweɪz / luôn luôn (always)
Đã biết (Already know) / Học (Learn)
